Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a user, I want the system to work well and be fast so that I can complete my tasks efficiently
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Added 'so that [benefit]' to express the business value delivered, replaced vague terms with measurable criteria, added acceptance criteria, and specified what is in scope to improve estimability and testability

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a developer, I want to implement user authentication so that users can log in.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story was improved to remove implementation technology prescriptions and add concrete acceptance criteria. The story now focuses on the business intent of implementing user authentication, without specifying how it should be done. The acceptance criteria are measurable and verifiable, allowing the team to estimate the effort required and test the functionality.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: En tant qu'administrateur, je veux que l'application soit rapide et intuitive afin de permettre une expérience utilisateur fluide
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Added 'so that' clause to express business value, replaced vague terms with measurable criteria, defined acceptance criteria with action verbs and measurable conditions, and clarified scope to improve estimability

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a registered user, I want to log in to my account so that I can access my personal dashboard.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Added two acceptance criteria with action verbs and measurable conditions to improve testability, kept the core business intent and removed any implementation technology prescriptions.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a customer, I want to view my order history so that I can track my past purchases.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story was improved by adding more acceptance criteria with measurable conditions, while keeping the core business intent and removing any implementation technology prescriptions. The acceptance criteria now include action verbs and specific conditions, making the story more testable and estimable.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: En tant qu'utilisateur, je veux pouvoir réinitialiser mon mot de passe afin d'accéder à mon compte si je l'oublie.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: Les critères d'acceptation ont été ajoutés pour rendre l'histoire testable. Les termes vagues ont été remplacés par des conditions mesurables. Les prescriptions technologiques ont été supprimées. L'histoire est maintenant indépendante, négociable, valorisable, estimable, petite et testable.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: En tant que responsable RH, je veux consulter les candidatures reçues afin de sélectionner les meilleurs profils pour un entretien, so that je puisse identifier les candidats les plus qualifiés.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story lacked a clear 'so that' clause, measurable conditions, and specific enough acceptance criteria. The improved story adds a 'so that' clause to express business value, and rewrites the acceptance criteria to include action verbs and measurable conditions with placeholders for unspecified values.

Llama-3.3-70B.improved_story: As a registered user, I want to reset my password so that I can regain access to my account when I forget my credentials.
Llama-3.3-70B.reasoning: The original story was already quite well-structured, but some acceptance criteria needed rewording to include action verbs and measurable conditions. The story now fully satisfies the INVEST framework by being independent, negotiable, valuable, estimable, small, and testable, with a clear 'so that' clause and concrete acceptance criteria.
